E01.notes: Pool exhaustion + clear historical match — engine should auto-recommend, not escalate.

E02.notes: TLS cert rotation is cert-ops, human-only. Auto-action is wrong.

E04.notes: Infra layer — either action is acceptable; auto rollback is preferred but page is acceptable.

E05.notes: Outcome-weighted voting should tie-break. Either acceptable but explanation must show vote weights.

E06.notes: Conflicting evidence — engine that trusts logs alone picks payment-svc (wrong). Trace anomaly says cart-svc -> cart-redis. Page is also acceptable; auto rollback of payment-svc is the wrong answer.

E07.notes: OOD — no historical incident closely matches this. Engine must escalate. Any auto-action is wrong.

E08.notes: Alert fires on bb-edge (leaf cascade). True root is t24-service (deepest, drifts first). Auto-rollbacking bb-edge is wrong. Page or t24 action is acceptable.
